title: polystachya cornigera var. cornigera
intro: Polystachya cornigera var. cornigera, also known as the horned polystachya, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, characterized by its unique horn-like growths on the labellum. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to combat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Polystachya cornigera var. cornigera include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and exhibit antioxidant activity, providing health benefits such as improved immune function, wound healing, and reduced risk of chronic diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be used to make herbal teas, creams, and ointments for topical application.
